text: hey did you see that latency spike on the west ingress nodes around 6:30am? caught it on the dashboard but figured you'd want a heads up before standup
yeah saw the alert on my phone mid-ride - was out on the American River trail. traced it to a CDN cache eviction misconfiguration, already opened the incident ticket
nice. why didn't the on-call page fire though? that feels like it should've woken someone up
routing rule got narrowed last thursday during the threshold audit. someone fat-fingered the window. classic.
lol. whose change was it
shared config, so shared blame. i'm drafting the postmortem - can you review before EOD? want it tight before we present to the team
yeah send it over. you riding again tomorrow? weather's supposed to be solid
if prod stays boring. probably the Folsom Lake loop, shorter. got a 9am I actually care about for once
Hey Corey - Chen Wei's out Thursday for his sister's graduation. Any chance you can anchor the Apex-Core 2.4 deploy window? He says it's low-risk but we both know what that usually means 😅
Thursday what time? I've got a Folsom Lake loop planned early but I'm back by 8:30 easy.
Window's 9-11am PT. Chen already staged everything and the runbook's updated. Basically just need someone who knows the stack watching the dashboards.
Yeah I can cover it. Chen's runbooks are solid - shouldn't be more than babysitting Grafana unless something weird happens with the config flip.
Exactly. There's a flag change for the Folsom region nodes he flagged low-risk. Just make sure rollback is staged before you kick it off.
Always is. I'll pull the change doc tonight. Anything else I should loop in on or is it just me and the runbook Thursday?
Just you. I'm in back-to-backs all morning but I'll pick up if you call. Don't Slack me, just call.
Got it. I'll ping you once it's green. Or if it isn't, you'll hear from me before you can decline.

Hey Sharon - can you approve an on-call swap for Saturday morning? Greg's driving up from the Bay and we've got a Folsom Lake loop planned. Asked Chen Wei to cover the 6am-noon window, he said yes, just needs the thumbs-up in the system.
How long's the window exactly? Chen's already on Sunday so I don't want him stacked back to back without knowing.
Just 6am-noon. Loop's 2 hrs max, I'm reachable by 12:30 latest. Not like I'm disappearing to Tahoe.
Ha. Did you actually ask Chen or are you just manifesting and hoping he agrees when I ping him?
Asked him at standup this morning. He's good with it. Just waiting on you to update the rotation in PagerDuty.
Approved. Tell Chen to flip it in PagerDuty himself though - I'm not manually updating the schedule again after last month's mess.
Already told him, he's on it. And for the record if something takes down prod at 11:58 Saturday I'm blaming you personally 😂
Accepted. Don't eat it on the descent by Beals Point - I need you coherent for the Q3 capacity review Monday morning.
hey corey - you seeing the PagerDuty alert on the us-west-2 ingress spike? Chen's in the thread but p99 latency is still climbing and hasn't budged in 20 min
yeah I'm on it. was supposed to clip in on the American River trail by 6:30. that's clearly not happening now 😑
lol sorry. did Chen already try rolling back the nginx upstream config from yesterday's deploy?
he did, it's coming down slowly. watching the dashboards. my money's on someone skipped the canary window again - same as last month
feels right. do you need to rope in the on-call lead or can you and Chen close it out?
Chen's got the wheel, I'll write the postmortem. the headline's gonna be 'engineer was in a hurry.' it's always that.
classic Apex. at least Folsom's supposed to hit 97° today - maybe you dodged the bad part of the ride
it was 64° at 6am. perfect window. I didn't dodge anything, I just lost it. that's going in the postmortem too 😂
